# zendesk_view (Resource)

Manages a Zendesk view.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `title` (String) The title of the view.

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the view is active.
- `all` (Attributes List) Conditions that must ALL be met (AND logic). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--all))
- `any` (Attributes List) Conditions where ANY can be met (OR logic). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--any))
- `columns` (List of String) Column IDs to display in the view output.
- `description` (String) The description of the view.
- `group_by` (String) The field to group results by.
- `group_order` (String) The order of grouped results (asc or desc).
- `restriction` (Attributes) Who may access this view. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--restriction))
- `sort_by` (String) The field to sort results by.
- `sort_order` (String) The sort order (asc or desc).

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `default` (Boolean) Whether this is a default system view.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `position` (Number) The position of the view in the list.
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--all"></a>
### Nested Schema for `all`

Required:

- `field` (String) The name of the ticket field to filter on.
- `operator` (String) The comparison operator (e.g. is, is_not, less_than, greater_than).

Optional:

- `value` (String) The value to compare against.


<a id="nestedatt--any"></a>
### Nested Schema for `any`

Required:

- `field` (String) The name of the ticket field to filter on.
- `operator` (String) The comparison operator (e.g. is, is_not, less_than, greater_than).

Optional:

- `value` (String) The value to compare against.


<a id="nestedatt--restriction"></a>
### Nested Schema for `restriction`

Required:

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the group or user.
- `type` (String) The type of restriction (Group or User).
